props.name: linesGradient
props.description: Array of hex color strings for gradient coloring of lines (max 8 colors).

props.name: topWavePosition
props.type: { x: number; y: number; rotate: number }
props.description: Position and rotation settings for the top wave layer.

props.name: middleWavePosition
props.type: { x: number; y: number; rotate: number }
props.description: Position and rotation settings for the middle wave layer.

props.name: bottomWavePosition
props.type: { x: number; y: number; rotate: number }
props.description: Position and rotation settings for the bottom wave layer.

props.name: animationSpeed
props.description: Speed multiplier for the wave animation.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether the lines react to mouse/pointer movement.

props.name: bendRadius
props.description: Radius of the area affected by mouse interaction.

props.name: bendStrength
props.description: Intensity of the bend effect when interacting with mouse.

props.name: mouseDamping
props.description: Smoothing factor for mouse movement tracking (0-1).

props.name: parallax
props.description: Enable parallax effect with mouse movement.

props.name: mixBlendMode
props.description: CSS mix-blend-mode applied to the canvas element.
